title: When are Donald Trump's criminal trials? Here's what's coming
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump faces four criminal trials as he campaigns for the White House. Here's what we know about the schedule.

title: Moms for Liberty turns ire to FBI, alleging Biden-sponsored silencing
shortDescription: Moms for Liberty co-founder Tiffany Justice alleged the FBI is silencing parents' rights advocates marking a shift in focus away from ballot races.

title: How do you find unbiased jurors for Trump's NY hush money trial?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump may look for non-hostile New Yorkers and people who can hang a jury as jury selection starts in his hush money case.

title: Who is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell? Few Florida voters know Dem. Senate candidate, poll finds
shortDescription: An exclusive USA TODAY/Ipsos poll showcases the tough fight ahead for Florida Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell in her campaign against incumbent Republican Sen. Rick Scott.

title: Historic Trump New York hush money trial starts Monday: What to know
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is set to go on trial in Manhattan Monday in a criminal hush money case that could impact the 2024 election.

title: DeSantis more popular than Trump in Florida, poll finds
shortDescription: Gov. Ron DeSantis and former President Donald Trump feuded in the GOP presidential primary, but it didn't hurt DeSantis in Florida, a new poll finds.

title: 'Abomination: Ex-RNC head says of Trump's lead despite felony charges
shortDescription: A former chair of the Republican National Committee said Donald Trump's polling lead despite his myriad felony charges is an "abomination."

title: Joe Biden catching up to Donald Trump's lead, poll finds
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is catching up to former President Donald Trump’s polling lead, according to a new poll.

title: Federal judge won't dismiss gun charges in Hunter Biden case
shortDescription: U.S. District Judge Maryellen Noreika ruled against Hunter Biden's request to dismiss charges against him in his federal gun case.

title: Is Florida in play for Biden? Poll shows steep odds despite abortion measure.
shortDescription: Democrats will need to overcome a sharp enthusiasm gap in Florida, where the party hopes to get a boost from an abortion ballot referendum.

title: Here's how abortion could help Biden or Trump win reelection
shortDescription: How Joe Biden and Donald Trump navigate the minefield of abortion politics could determine which one is elected in November.

title: Trump, Speaker Johnson meet at Mar-a-Lago
shortDescription: Speaker Mike Johnson and former President Donald Trump met at Mar-a-Lago to unveil new GOP legislation, aimed at keeping non-citizens from voting.

title: 'Biggest aftershocks yet.' VP Harris blasts Trump over Arizona abortion ban
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris, visiting Arizona, accused Donald Trump of trying "take America back to the 1800s" by dismantling reproductive rights.

title: Trump won't get NY hush money trial delay based on pre-trial publicity
shortDescription: A New York judge rejected former President Donald Trump's bid to delay his criminal hush money trial based on pre-trial publicity around the case.

title: Fabricated Trump post about Judge Cannon resurfaces | Fact check
shortDescription: No such post appears on Trump's Truth Social account, though he has defended the judge assigned to his classified documents case.

title: Does the Alaska bill that wants to limit protests violate free speech?
shortDescription: The Last Frontier legislature considers bill that would make street protests without a permit illegal

title: 'I stand with the speaker.' Trump backs Johnson amid rebellion from right
shortDescription: Trump and Johnson met in Palm Beach Friday as the House speaker faces pressure from the right. Trump said, "I stand with the speaker."

title: No, Biden is not facing excommunication from Catholic Church | Fact check
shortDescription: Two Catholic leaders suggested Biden should be excommunicated, but experts said the process is rare and there's no evidence it's actually happening.

title: House passes controversial spying bill after brutal week of infighting
shortDescription: Fourth time (yes, the fourth) was the charm for House Republicans when the lower chamber voted to renew a controversial spying law.

title: Biden warns Iran against revenge strike on Israel as US moves troops
shortDescription: President Joe Biden issued a one-word caution to Tehran as Israel prepared for a possible barrage: 'Don't.'

title: Colorado lawmaker forgets loaded 9mm Glock handgun in capitol restroom
shortDescription: Colorado Rep. Don Wilson accidently left his loaded semiautomatic handgun inside a Capitol restroom, much to his chagrin.

title: Secret Service, police pledge 'highest' security for Trump trial
shortDescription: Officials said they will ensure peaceful protests outside the building and keep vehicle traffic and pedestrians moving safely. The trial is set to begin Monday.

title: FBI Director urges Congress to renew FISA
shortDescription: FBI Director Christopher Wray tells Congress how the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA) is "indispensable in keeping Americans safe".

title: White House pushing Congress to renew internet subsidy program
shortDescription: With more than 23 million households enrolled in the Affordable Connectivity Program, the Biden administration is pushing to renew its internet subsidies.
